Home / Services / Water Heater Repair & Installation

Water Heater Repair & Installation

Expert repair and installation of all types of water heaters.

A malfunctioning water heater can disrupt your entire household, especially during Houston's cooler months. First Aid Plumbing Specialist INC specializes in water heater repair and installation, offering prompt and reliable service to get your hot water flowing again. Whether you have a traditional tank water heater or a modern tankless system, our experienced technicians have the knowledge and skills to diagnose and repair any issue. We work with all major brands and models, and we're committed to providing honest and affordable solutions.

We understand the importance of a properly functioning water heater, and we'll do everything we can to get yours back up and running quickly. If repair isn't an option, we'll help you choose the right replacement water heater for your needs and budget. We'll handle the entire installation process, ensuring that your new water heater is properly connected and operating efficiently. Don't suffer through another cold shower – call First Aid Plumbing Specialist INC for expert water heater service.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Diagnose the water heater problem.
  2. 02 Step 2: Provide a detailed repair estimate.
  3. 03 Step 3: Perform necessary repairs or recommend replacement.
  4. 04 Step 4: Install new water heater and ensure proper operation.

Benefits

  • Restores hot water quickly
  • Reduces energy costs
  • Extends the life of your water heater
  • Ensures safe and reliable operation

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does a water heater typically last?

Most water heaters last between 8 and 12 years. Regular maintenance can help extend its lifespan.

What are the signs that my water heater needs repair?

Lack of hot water, rusty water, strange noises, and leaks are all signs that your water heater may need repair.

Is a tankless water heater right for me?

Tankless water heaters offer on-demand hot water and can save energy, but they may not be suitable for all homes. We can help you determine if a tankless system is the right choice for your needs.

Get a Free Estimate
